Systems.Name: Proxima Centauri
Systems.Description: A small red dwarf star orbited by several rocky worlds. A good starting point for new pilots.

Systems.Name: Alpha Centauri
Systems.Description: The brightest star in the Centaurus constellation. Home to a thriving trade port.

Systems.Name: Barnard's Star
Systems.Description: A dim red dwarf on the fringe of Federation space. Rumors of pirates persist.

Systems.Name: Tribune
Systems.Description: A mysterious blue-white star system. Little is known about its planets.

Systems.Name: Vega
Systems.Description: A brilliant blue star and a hub of scientific research. The Vega station offers rare upgrades.

Systems.Name: Cygnus Station
Systems.Description: A remote outpost built into an asteroid belt. A good place to lay low.

Systems.Name: Draco Prime
Systems.Description: The capital of the Free Worlds Alliance. Heavily fortified and prosperous.

Systems.Name: Sirius
Systems.Description: The brightest star in the night sky. Sirius A is home to a bustling colonial presence.

Systems.Name: Altair
Systems.Description: A bright white star in the Aquila constellation. Altair's ports boast the finest racing in the galaxy.

Systems.Name: Capella
Systems.Description: A golden giant in the constellation Auriga. Capella's agricultural colonies feed the Federation.

Systems.Name: Regulus
Systems.Description: The heart of the Lion. Regulus is a loyalist Federation system with a strong naval presence.

Systems.Name: Fomalhaut
Systems.Description: A lonely white star on the fringe. Fomalhaut's single asteroid field offers little save shelter for outlaws.

Systems.Name: Lyra
Systems.Description: A blue-white star system known for its crystalline moons and Alliance military academy.

Systems.Name: Spica
Systems.Description: A blue giant in Virgo. Spica's orbital shipyards produce some of the finest frigates in the fleet.

Systems.Name: Polaris
Systems.Description: The North Star. A remote navigation beacon with little more than a refueling depot for deep-space travelers.

Systems.Name: Arcturus
Systems.Description: An orange giant and the jewel of the Free Worlds. Arcturus Prime is a center of art and diplomacy.

Systems.Name: Aldebaran
Systems.Description: The red eye of the Bull. An ungoverned system where pirates and smugglers trade freely.

Systems.Name: Pleione
Systems.Description: A blue star in the Pleiades cluster, this system is largely unexplored save for a few automated beacons.

Systems.Name: Electra
Systems.Description: One of the brighter Pleiades, Electra hosts a Free Worlds listening post and a small trading community.

Systems.Name: Atlas
Systems.Description: A massive yellow giant in the Pleiades. Atlas Station serves as a trading nexus for the outer systems.

Systems.Name: Maia
Systems.Description: A blue-white star in the Pleiades cluster. Maia's terraformed world is a Federation showcase project.

Systems.Name: Celaeno
Systems.Description: A faint Pleiades member. Celaeno's system is a haven for pirates preying on the Electra-Atlas trade route.

Systems.Name: Taygeta
Systems.Description: A bright blue-white star in the Pleiades. The Free Worlds maintain a scientific outpost here.

Systems.Name: Asterope
Systems.Description: A dim star on the outermost edge of explored space. No law, no services, no hope.

Systems.Name: Merope
Systems.Description: A hazy star obscured by nebular dust. Only the desperate or foolish travel this route without escort.

Systems.Name: Aquila
Systems.Description: The Eagle. A Federation mining operation extracts heavy metals from Aquila's dense asteroid belt.

Systems.Name: Corvus
Systems.Description: The Crow. A dead system of dark rocks and silence. Navigational charts warn all pilots away.

Systems.Name: Rigel
Systems.Description: A blue supergiant in Orion. Rigel's massive starports make it a cornerstone of Federation trade.

Systems.Name: Betelgeuse
Systems.Description: A red supergiant on the verge of going supernova. The Alliance maintains a watch post here.

Systems.Name: Deneb
Systems.Description: A brilliant white supergiant in Cygnus. Deneb's system is a popular waypoint for travelers heading coreward.

Systems.Name: Pollux
Systems.Description: A yellow giant in Gemini. Pollux is a prosperous Federation system known for its universities.

Systems.Name: Castor
Systems.Description: A white binary star in Gemini. Castor's orbital markets are famous for exotic goods from beyond the frontier.

Systems.Name: Orion
Systems.Description: The Hunter. Orion's central station coordinates Free Worlds defense across the eastern arm.

Systems.Name: Taurus
Systems.Description: The Bull. A quiet Federation agricultural system supplying food to the eastern colonies.

Systems.Name: Gemini
Systems.Description: The Twins. A bustling Free Worlds system where twin planets orbit a shared center of gravity.

Systems.Name: Leo
Systems.Description: The Lion. A proud Federation system with a rich history and a powerful defense fleet.

Systems.Name: Antares
Systems.Description: The rival of Mars. This fiery red supergiant system is lawless and dangerous, home to outlaw clans.

Systems.Name: Trigor Alpha
Systems.Description: The gateway to the Trigor Empire. Heavily patrolled by Trigor warships.

Systems.Name: Trigor
Systems.Description: The throneworld of the Trigor Empire. A massive industrial fortress-system bristling with orbital defenses.

Systems.Name: Trigor Beta
Systems.Description: A Trigor military outpost guarding the eastern approaches to the Empire.

Systems.Name: Trigor Gamma
Systems.Description: A penal colony orbiting a dim red star. Faint distress signals are picked up near the lower atmosphere.
